item.description:
I am a research engineer at LayerZero Labs, where my work lies at the intersection of mechanism design and cryptography, with a particular focus on blockchain technologies.

I recently completed my PhD at Carnegie Mellon University, where I was fortunate to have Elaine Shi as my advisor. Before that, I was a research assistant at Academia Sinica, hosted by Kai-Min Chung. Earlier in my career, I was a blockchain researcher at DEXON foundation.

I hold a master’s degree in Electrical Engineering and a bachelor’s degree in Physics (with a minor in Philosophy) from National Taiwan University.

CV & Google Scholar

You can find my curriculum vitae and Google Scholar profile here

Contact

Email: hao.chung [at] layerzerolabs.org
